senses.gloss: one of the beautiful Names of God, "the Shaper, the Fashioner"

examples.text: هُوَ اللَّهُ الْخَالِقُ الْبَارِئُ الْمُصَوِّرُ لَهُ الْأَسْمَاءُ الْحُسْنَى يُسَبِّحُ لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ وَهُوَ الْعَزِيزُ الْحَكِيمُ
examples.english: He is Allah, the Creator, the Inventor, the Fashioner; to Him belong the best names. Whatever is in the heavens and earth is exalting Him. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.

etymology.text:
Derived from the active participle of صَوَّرَ (ṣawwara, “to photograph, to depict”).

Derived from the passive participle of صَوَّرَ (ṣawwara, “to photograph, to depict”).

Noun of place of صَوَّرَ (ṣawwara, “to photograph, to depict”).
